creator: fwall@inotronic.de
text:
> I create (copy old version and fix bsd.php.mk) new set of 
> php52 ports (81 item)

The maintainer of the php ports has stated that maintaining
the php port framework is a considerable burden. I think
this argues against the new ports. I'm willing to help
maintaining the PHP 5.2 ports.

I'm just waiting for a maintainer to comment on this or 
commit the new ports, if nothing else argues against it.


Frank Wall
